The Developer

Meet Stephen Olabamiji

"I'm not just a developer — I'm an innovative builder. Every line of code I write is driven by creative thinking and a deep desire to solve real problems in ways that haven't been done before."

Stephen Olabamiji is an innovative Data Analyst and Systems Automation Specialist with 5+ years of hands-on experience. He specializes in building production-grade applications that combine technical depth with creative thinking — from live GPS logistics platforms to interactive Bible quiz systems and mentorship apps. His work is defined not just by functionality, but by a relentless drive to innovate.

✦ Data Analysis ✦ Systems Automation ✦ Fullstack Dev ✦ Mobile Apps ✦ UI/UX Design

How I Work

From Idea to Launch

A clear, structured process so you always know what's happening and what comes next.

1

Discovery Call

We talk through your vision, users, and goals. Free, no pressure — just honest conversation.

2

Proposal & Plan

I send a clear scope, timeline, and pricing. You approve before a single line is written.

3

Build & Review

Regular check-ins and previews. You see progress weekly and can guide the direction.

4

Launch & Support

I handle deployment, train your team, and stay available for support after go-live.

Common Questions

Questions You Might Have

Absolutely. Most of my clients are pastors, school owners, and business operators — not tech people. I handle every technical detail and communicate in plain language. You focus on your vision; I'll handle the building.

I specifically design for low running costs. Depending on your package, monthly costs can be as low as ₦5,000–₦30,000 for hosting and services. I'll give you a full breakdown before we start, so there are no surprises.

Yes — in fact, this is one of my specialties. Church apps can include giving, attendance, event management, devotionals, and more. School portals can include fees, results, assignments, and parent communication. Everything is tailored to your specific structure.

All packages come with post-launch support. I'm reachable via WhatsApp and respond quickly. For ongoing maintenance, we can arrange a monthly support plan to keep your system running smoothly.

Simply reach out via WhatsApp, email, or phone below. We'll have a free 30-minute conversation about your organization, what you need, and what the right package looks like. No pressure — just a conversation.
